case_title: GONZALES LOU VS TOWER PROPERTIES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GONZALES LOU AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER PROPERTIES SKYLINE REALTY WEINHOLD MR. C/O TOWER PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SKYLINE REALTY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES LOU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOWER PROPERTIES SKYLINE REALTY PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN THE BURDEN OF PROOF. HEARD IN DEPT. 3 BY JUDGE SING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
